Comment.MultiLanguageText: B Axis Pos. Min to allow fixture opening
B Axis Pos. Max to allow fixture opening
V Axis Pos. Min to allow fixture opening/closing
V Axis Pos. Max to allow fixture opening/closing
W Axis Pos. Min to allow fixture opening/closing
W Axis Pos. Max to allow fixture opening/closing

LineComment.Text: Version | Date | Expert in charge | Changes applied

StructuredText.Text: F_Hold Key Disable + channel switch Key[7]

LineComment.Text: Force toggle Key[7] when hold is active
Hold signal for clamping - M84: Hold clamp
Release signal for clamping - M85: Release clamp

StructuredText.Text: F_Vacuum Key Disable + Channel switch Key[8]

LineComment.Text: Force TOGGLE Key[8] when Vacuum is active
Fixture Vacuum ON - M86: Vacuum ON
Fixture Vacuum OFF (Station 1) - M87: Vacuum OFF
iProdMissing <= Measure <= iProdOK_LimLow => Missing Backwall (NOT POSSIBLE FOR FL.0153)
Measure < iProdMissing => Missing Part (NOT POSSIBLE FOR FL.0153)
WFA A supprimer quand recette OK
WFA A supprimer quand recette OK
Voir dans FB_Recipe les transferts des limites High et Low
